name: MouseSelectMode
summary: Defines enumerated constant values to indicate a particular window selection mode.

enum_values.name: Crossing
enum_values.summary: Anything that crosses this window will be selected.

enum_values.name: Window
enum_values.summary: Anything that is inside this window will be selected.

enum_values.name: Combo
enum_values.summary: Drag a rectangle from left to right for window select. Drag a rectangle from right to left for crossing select.
